description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automated Test Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build-windows, build-linux, and build-macos. Each job should check out the repository, update submodules, download and extract dependencies like premake, libevent, freetype, lua, sqlite, irrKlang, and irrlicht, then use premake to generate build files and compile the project. Finally, upload the build artifacts.
